chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2347 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10580/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2025 Mr. Inzamam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. The petitioner impugnes show cause notice, however, learned counsel states that the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. He further states that notice may be determined vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending such adjudication, no further coercive action be taken there against. Counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
